items.claim: Max Holloway is 34 years old and may be entering a period of physical decline.
items.quote: at 34 years old, is this going to be the moment where we start to see that decline?

items.claim: Max Holloway lacked a viable Plan B or tactical adjustment when outclassed in his fight against Charles Oliveira.
items.quote: it certainly just looked like when you mentioned outclass that he was outclassed in that fight and that he just didn't have a very good plan B to go to.

items.claim: Max Holloway is not a naturally large lightweight and typically walks around at 170-175 pounds.
items.quote: I think he only walks around 170 175 like he is not a a huge um lightweight

items.claim: Max Holloway has absorbed a significant amount of damage throughout his career due to his involvement in many wars.
items.quote: he's taken a lot of damage. He's certainly getting a lot older. ... all the wars that Max has been through

items.claim: Max Holloway's high level of activity (eight fights in five years) may be a detriment to his physical longevity compared to Conor McGregor's inactivity.
items.quote: you can almost go the back end way like maybe it's to the detriment of Max Holloway that he's had that many

items.claim: Conor McGregor's power is expected to carry up to the 170-pound weight class.
items.quote: Connor can thump if nothing else. He probably his power is going to carry a 170.
